# Pizza Hot Pano Aqil

> Pano Aqil's #1 pizzeria located at Baiji Chowk. Wood-fired pizzas, Mighty Zinger burgers, shawarmas, rolls, sides and combo deals. Free delivery within Pano Aqil. Order via WhatsApp, phone, or in-store.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: 0317 3821766, 0319 8315723
- Email: pizzahotpanoaqil@gmail.com
- Address: Baiji Chowk, Near Motorway Office, Pano Aqil, Sindh 65120, Pakistan
- Hours: Daily 12:00 PM – 1:00 AM
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/p/Pizza-Hot-100067487342420/
- Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Pizza+hot/@27.8520306,69.1015385,17z

## Menu Highlights
- Pizzas: Seekh Kabab, Afghani, Chicken Tikka, Chicken Fajita, Super Supreme, Peri Peri, Tandoori, Creamy Stuffed Crust (PKR 500–1,450)
- Burgers: Mighty Zinger, Zinger, Tower, Chicken Patty (PKR 220–650)
- Shawarma & Rolls: Zinger, Cheese, Jalapeno, Paratha Roll (PKR 180–390)
- Sides: Hot Shots, French Fries, Crispy Wings, Soft Drinks (PKR 80–650)

## Combos
- Pizza Hot Combo: Medium Pizza + Zinger Burger + Fries + Drink — PKR 1,499
- Family Feast: Large Pizza + 2 Zinger Burgers + 4 Drinks + Fries — PKR 2,299
- Student Saver: Small Pizza + Zinger Burger + Drink — PKR 799

## Ordering
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/923173821766
- Cash on Delivery only
- Free delivery within Pano Aqil, ~30 min average
- 100% Halal certified
